_doc: Source-of-truth: /Users/sage/LOCAL/RD/RD-SPACES/Collateral/03 EXTERNAL Per-Segment Page Copy.md (v1) and docs/SEGMENT-COPY.md (v4 in repo). v4 introduces five Phase 1 segments + three Phase-2/demoted, USD-primary currency with GEL toggle (no GBP), and validated pain-matrix reframes. See docs/AUDIT-V4.md for the defect-by-defect change list (CT-001 through CT-018). Every customer-facing string MUST come from the copy doc — do not invent.

currency_config.rate_source_note: Fixed quarterly. Update this value when the rate drifts more than 5%. May 2026 baseline.

main.title: Spaces by Rogue Divisions — Walkthroughs that close the trust gap when buyers are somewhere else
main.description: Walkthroughs that bridge the distance between remote buyers and physical spaces. Built for off-plan developers, wedding venues, hotels, STR managers, and cultural venues.
main.og_title: They are somewhere else. Win them anyway.
main.og_description: When the buyer is somewhere else, they need to walk the space before they commit.
main.subhead: When the buyer is somewhere else, they need to walk the space before they commit.
main.demo_caption: BlueTokai Coffee · sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi captures shipping shortly.
main.about_rd_oneliner: Spaces is a Rogue Divisions studio. We capture, host, and publish — your relationship is with operators, not a platform.
main.matterport_faq_answer: For buyer-decision visualisation, this is sharper and faster. For property workflows that need precise floor plans and measurements, Matterport is stronger. Spaces is built for buyer confidence — faster capture, hosted walkthrough, embedded in your sales channels.

developers.title: Spaces for developers — Buyers wire faster when they have walked the space
developers.description: Photoreal show flat walkthroughs that close off-plan deposits faster. Pasted into WhatsApp, embedded in brochures, sent to buyers in Dubai, Tel Aviv, London.
developers.og_description: Buyers who walk the show flat decide before they fly in. Your sales agents paste the link into WhatsApp. The conversation moves forward.

hub_card.label: Off-plan developers
hub_card.hook: Show flat walkthroughs that close off-plan deposits faster.

developers.h1_line1: Buyers wire faster when they have
developers.subhead: Photoreal show flat walkthrough. Pasted into WhatsApp. The deposit conversation moves forward.
developers.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi off-plan show flats captured this month.

outcomes.title: Sales velocity.
outcomes.body: Buyers who walk the finished show flat decide in days, not weeks. Off-plan deposits stop stalling on doubt. Industry data shows reservation timelines collapsing from 112 days to 14 when buyers can virtually walk the unit.

outcomes.title: The buyer who cannot fly.
outcomes.body: Your off-plan buyers are in Dubai, Tel Aviv, London, Yerevan, Tehran. The walkthrough does the viewing for them. Most never land in Tbilisi until handover.

outcomes.title: Render-to-real bridge.
outcomes.body: CGI sells the floor plan. Walkthroughs sell the deposit. The two work together at different stages of the buyer's decision. Brochure renders read as not-yet-real; a walkthrough of the finished show flat reads as committed and built.

outcomes.title: Sales agent ammunition.
outcomes.body: Pasted into WhatsApp. Embedded in the brochure PDF. Living on the project website. The same link your buyer's spouse will watch in their kitchen tonight. The deal moves on every device.

objection.quote: We already have CGI of every unit.
objection.reply: Keep them. CGI is necessary for the units not yet built. It is not what convinces a buyer to wire a deposit. A photoreal walkthrough of the finished show flat is. They are different products serving different stages of the buyer's decision. Use both.

developers.pricing_anchor: From $1,500 for a Standard show-flat engagement. Modules per unit type. Multi-project portfolios at bespoke pricing.

calculator.step3_hint: Each unit type as its own walkthrough

faq.q: Do we capture before or after the show flat is dressed?
faq.a: After. The walkthrough should show the buyer the experience they will live in. Bare-build walkthroughs do not convert. We schedule capture once the show flat is dressed.

faq.q: Can the walkthrough be sent via email?
faq.a: Yes — as a hosted link. Some email clients do not render interactive iframes reliably, so we deliver a click-through link plus a preview thumbnail. The link works in Mailchimp, WhatsApp, brochure PDFs, and your project website.

faq.q: Multilingual captions and CTAs in Russian, Hebrew, Farsi, Arabic?
faq.a: Yes. Multilingual builds at module pricing per language. One scene, multiple language overlays. One link per market for paid acquisition.

faq.q: What about exteriors and macro context?
faq.a: The Spatial Studio viewer combines Google's photoreal 3D city tiles with our high-fidelity interior. Buyer sees the neighbourhood, then zooms into your show flat. Available as an add-on.

faq.q: Can we update when the building is finished?
faq.a: Yes. Re-capture at completion at module pricing. The walkthrough then doubles as a handover asset for buyers.

final_cta.h2: Capture the show flat. Send it to your highest-intent buyer. Watch what happens.
final_cta.body: One free show-flat pilot. Link the next morning. Send it to the buyer you have been chasing for three weeks. If it moves the conversation, we scope the project. If not, you keep the pilot. No obligation.

weddings.title: Spaces for wedding venues — Let her walk the chapel before she flies in
weddings.description: 3D walkthroughs of vineyard estates and event venues. Couples and planners walk the venue from London, New York, Tel Aviv before they commit.
weddings.og_description: She walks the ceremony hall, the gardens, the bridal suite. The planner stops bouncing your venue against six others.

hub_card.label: Wedding venues
hub_card.hook: Let the couple walk the venue before they fly in.

weddings.subhead: She sees the ceremony hall, the gardens, the bridal suite. The decision gets made.
weddings.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Kakheti and Tbilisi venue captures shipping this season.

outcomes.title: The shortlist decision.
outcomes.body: The couple, family, and planner walk the venue from London or New York. The shortlist closes faster. Site visits move from 'can we come and see it?' to 'we have decided on dates.'

outcomes.title: Six venues, one differentiator.
outcomes.body: Your competitors have photographs. You have a walkthrough. When the planner compiles the shortlist, your venue is the one that closes.

outcomes.title: The planner's workflow, easier.
outcomes.body: Your venue is no longer one of six similar tabs. The planner forwards your link and walks it with the couple over Zoom. The conversation moves to dates and catering, not 'when can we visit?'

objection.quote: Our wedding photographer has incredible shots of the venue.
objection.reply: Wedding photographs sell the romance. Walkthroughs sell the certainty. The couple's mother needs to see the layout. The planner needs to see the catering flow. The walkthrough answers the questions photographs do not.

weddings.pricing_transparency: Standard engagement from $1,500. What is included: ceremony hall, dining space, gardens, bridal suite. Modules for additional bridal suites, dressing rooms, vineyard exterior, mountain or estate exterior. Multi-building estates at Major tier from $3,000.
weddings.pricing_anchor: From $1,500 for a Standard estate engagement. Modules for additional zones. Multi-building estates at Major tier from $3,000.

calculator.step3_label: Bridal suite, dressing rooms, gardens, ceremony exterior?
calculator.step3_hint: Each captured as its own walkthrough

faq.q: Can we capture before the season opens?
faq.a: Yes. Pre-season capture means the walkthrough is live for the spring engagement-season enquiry surge.

faq.q: What about the gardens and outdoor areas?
faq.a: Outdoor scenes are captured separately and integrated. The viewer moves seamlessly from chapel to garden to vineyard.

faq.q: Can we add seasonal scenes (autumn, winter)?
faq.a: Yes. Re-captures at module pricing. Some Kakheti estates run two captures: spring vine-leaf-green and harvest-gold autumn.

faq.q: Do we need to clear the venue during capture?
faq.a: No. Capture is non-disruptive and takes about 20 minutes per room. Staff and operations continue around us.

faq.q: Can the walkthrough live in our enquiry auto-responder?
faq.a: Yes. Most planners enquire by form; the walkthrough drops into the auto-reply. We provide the snippet.

final_cta.h2: Capture before the season. Book solid through it.
final_cta.body: Free pilot on one space — the ceremony hall, the bridal suite, your call. Link the next morning. Send it to the planner choosing between six venues. If it moves the conversation, we scope the estate. No obligation if it does not land.

hotels.title: Spaces for boutique hotels — Recover the commission OTAs take
hotels.description: 3D suite walkthroughs that close the gap photos cannot. Guests book direct on your site. You keep the 15-25% OTAs would have taken.
hotels.og_title: Walkthroughs that recover OTA commission for boutique hotels
hotels.og_description: Guests who walk the suite book direct. You keep the margin. Built for boutique hotels and design properties.
hotels.subhead: Walkthroughs that close the trust gap photographs cannot. Guests book direct. You keep the margin.
hotels.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi and Batumi suite captures shipping this month.

outcomes.title: More guests book direct.
outcomes.body: Photographs sold the listing on Booking. The walkthrough sells the room on your own site. Guests who walk the suite before booking do not hedge to the OTA.

outcomes.title: One avoided OTA booking pays back the scan.
outcomes.body: On the average Tbilisi ADR over a four-night stay, a single avoided OTA commission covers a Compact engagement. Every direct booking after is pure margin.

outcomes.title: Suite-level differentiation.
outcomes.body: Every suite type gets its own scene. The Deluxe is no longer 'another room with a king bed.' The visitor walks it. Cross-sell happens at the walkthrough, not at check-in.

outcomes.title: Forever asset.
outcomes.body: Hosted under your domain. Embedded on your booking engine. Live for the lifetime of the hotel. New suites added as you refurbish, at module pricing.

objection.quote: Our photographer just shot the whole hotel.
objection.reply: Keep them. Walkthroughs do not replace photography. Photographs do the seducing on Instagram. The walkthrough does the closing on your direct-booking flow.

hotels.pricing_anchor: From $500 for a Compact engagement on one suite. Modules for additional suite types. Hotels above 40 rooms or with conference space at Major tier from $3,000.

step2_options.name: Hotel with conference centre — talk to us

calculator.step3_label: How many suite types do you want shown?
calculator.step3_hint: Each suite type captured as its own walkthrough

faq.q: Can we capture during off-season?
faq.a: Off-season is ideal. Lower occupancy means easier scheduling. We can capture a 12-room boutique inside a single day.

faq.q: Do we need to close rooms during capture?
faq.a: Only the room being captured. About 20 minutes per room. Your housekeeping schedule absorbs it.

faq.q: How does this work with our booking engine?
faq.a: We provide an embed snippet that drops into your booking-engine description fields. Compatible with Cloudbeds, Mews, Little Hotelier, SiteMinder, and most major systems. We confirm fit on the scoping call.

faq.q: Can we add new suites later?
faq.a: Yes. Each additional suite type is captured at module pricing in the next visit. New module captures are turned around in 48 hours.

faq.q: Can guests view it on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. The walkthrough is fully responsive. Most guest views are on phone. We optimise the experience for that.

final_cta.h2: One free suite. Live the next morning. In and out before housekeeping.
final_cta.body: Book a pilot. We capture one suite, send you the link the next morning. If it lands, we scope the rest of the property. If not, you keep the pilot. No charge, no obligation.

managers.title: Spaces for STR managers — Show owners you are investing in their door
managers.description: Per-door subscription walkthroughs. The asset your owners see when they ask what they pay you for. Onboard your fleet in two weeks.
managers.og_description: Per-door walkthroughs that prove you are operating the property, not just listing it. Built for managers running 20 to 300 units.
managers.h1_line1: Show owners you are investing in
managers.subhead: Per-door walkthroughs. The proof your owners see when they ask what they pay you for. Onboard the fleet in two weeks.
managers.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Live fleet capture programmes start in Tbilisi this month.

outcomes.title: The asset your owner sees.
outcomes.body: When an owner asks what their management fee is paying for, the walkthrough is the answer. Proof of investment in their property. The artefact that demonstrates you are operating the unit, not just listing it.

outcomes.title: Every door, working harder.
outcomes.body: Listings with a walkthrough convert better on your own site than they do on Booking. Higher click-through. Higher booked rates. Fewer surprise-driven bad reviews from guests who arrive expecting something different.

outcomes.title: Predictable rollout.
outcomes.body: Two weeks to capture your initial fleet. New takeovers captured within 48 hours of you taking the keys. One line in your budget. No per-unit haggling.

outcomes.title: The fleet standard.
outcomes.body: Every listing in your portfolio looks distinct. The whole fleet becomes a differentiator. Owners see what their unit looks like next to the others — and so do guests.

objection.quote: We already pay for professional photos.
objection.reply: Keep them. Walkthroughs do not replace photographs. Photographs sell at the listing-tile level: the click, the swipe, the favourite. Walkthroughs sell at the decision stage: the confident booking. They work together. The walkthrough is the differentiator photographs no longer are.

managers.pricing_anchor: From $35 per door per month, plus a one-off onboarding capture fee. Two-week initial rollout. Talk to us about fleets over 150 doors.

calculator.step2_label: How many units in your fleet?

faq.q: What happens when we acquire new units?
faq.a: New takeovers are captured within 48 hours of you taking the keys. Your owner sees the asset is live before their previous manager has finished the handover.

faq.q: Do we own the walkthroughs or do you?
faq.a: You do. Hosted on our infrastructure, white-labelled, transferable if you ever change manager systems.

faq.q: Can we white-label the viewer to our brand?
faq.a: Yes. Your colours, your logo, your domain if you have one.

faq.q: What if a unit churns?
faq.a: Subscription pauses on that door. No exit fee. If the unit returns within twelve months, it relights without a re-capture.

faq.q: How does the onboarding run?
faq.a: Day 1: scoping call. Days 3-12: capture every door in clusters of 6-10 per day. Days 13-14: review, publish, hand the embed snippets to your listings team.

final_cta.h2: Capture one door this week. Onboard the fleet next.
final_cta.body: Free pilot on one of your most contested listings. The link the next morning. If the result lands, we scope the fleet rollout. If it does not, you keep the pilot. No obligation.

galleries.title: Spaces for cultural venues — Permanent record. New revenue line.
galleries.description: Walkthroughs for galleries, museums, and cultural foundations. Donor access after closing. Venue hire enquiries that close before the call. Grant evidence that stands out.
galleries.og_description: The exhibition is temporary. The record does not have to be. Curators, donors, jurors, and grant assessors walk the show after it closes.
galleries.h1_mark: The record does not have to be.
galleries.subhead: Curators, donors, jurors, and grant assessors walk the show after it closes.
galleries.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi cultural venue captures shipping with the next exhibition cycle.

outcomes.title: Donor and grant evidence.
outcomes.body: Funding applications and institutional bids reference walkable documentation, not slide decks. Your case for next year strengthens. Grant assessors see the work as it was installed.

outcomes.title: A new revenue line: venue hire.
outcomes.body: Corporate and private events booked from the walkthrough. The under-monetised space outside opening hours becomes a paid asset. Event planners commit without a site visit.

outcomes.title: The archive that stays alive.
outcomes.body: Every show captured. Year after year. The institution's history becomes an accessible record, not a folder of installation photographs.

objection.reply: Installation photographs document the work. A walkthrough documents the experience. Walking a show is what curators, jurors, donors, and grant assessors are deciding from. The walkthrough is what they want.

galleries.pricing_anchor: From $1,500 for a Standard exhibition capture. Modules for additional rooms. Annual programming partnerships at bespoke pricing.

calculator.step3_hint: Each exhibition room as its own walkthrough

faq.q: Can we capture before the show opens to the public?
faq.a: Yes. Capture is scheduled in the install-week window, after the work is hung but before opening night.

faq.q: How long does capture take?
faq.a: About 20-30 minutes per room. A typical single-floor venue is captured in a single morning.

faq.q: Can we share the walkthrough in our newsletter?
faq.a: Yes. We provide a hosted link and preview asset for newsletters, plus embed code for your website. Email clients do not render interactive iframes reliably, so newsletters use the link; the site uses the embed.

faq.q: Do we hold the rights?
faq.a: Yes. You hold the rights to the walkthrough. We hold no claim to the work, the artist's IP, or your archive.

faq.q: Can you do recurring capture for every show?
faq.a: Yes. Annual programming partnerships are bespoke. Most institutions run six to ten shows a year; we structure that as a per-show retainer.

final_cta.h2: Capture this show. Forever access for everyone who could not fly in.
final_cta.body: Free pilot on the current exhibition. Link the next morning. Share it with the curators on your invite list who could not travel. If it lands, we scope the programming year. No obligation.

hosts.demoted_reason: Forced fit per research — unit economics fail after CAC.
hosts.title: Spaces for Airbnb hosts — The listing with the walkthrough button
hosts.description: One-off 3D walkthroughs for solo Airbnb hosts. Differentiate against 6,500 active Tbilisi listings. From $129. Yours forever.
hosts.og_description: Differentiation against thousands of similar listings. From $129. Live by the weekend. Yours forever.
hosts.subhead: One walkthrough. One listing. Yours forever. Embed it on Airbnb, Booking, your own site, anywhere.
hosts.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. The same format hosts use to differentiate their listing on every platform.

outcomes.title: The click.
outcomes.body: Of more than six thousand active Tbilisi listings, almost none have a 3D walkthrough. The thumbnail with the walkthrough button gets the scroll-stop.

outcomes.title: The trust.
outcomes.body: The guests who book your unit care about quality. A walkthrough proves the photographs were not flattering. They scroll past the cheaper listings. They book yours.

outcomes.title: The lifetime.
outcomes.body: You pay once. The walkthrough lives forever. Embed it on Airbnb, on Booking, on your own page, on a WhatsApp message to a returning guest. It does not expire.

objection.quote: I can do this myself on my phone.
objection.reply: You can. The Spatial Lens app is free and we use it ourselves. The reason hosts pay is not that they cannot capture. It is that they do not have the two hours to learn the workflow, fix the misaligned splat, post-process the file, host it, and embed it. We do that and send you the link.

hosts.pricing_anchor: From $129 one-off. One walkthrough. Hosted forever. No subscription. Higher-tier capture available for villas and multi-bedroom units.

calculator.h2: See what your space costs, in a minute.

faq.q: I have three listings — do I get a discount?
faq.a: Yes. Tell us at the booking call. The second and third units are captured at a reduced rate in the same visit.

faq.q: Can I embed this on Airbnb, Booking, and my own site?
faq.a: On your own site and any platform that accepts an iframe or external link. Airbnb and Booking do not allow direct iframe embeds, but they accept walkthrough links in the listing description, and most international guests click through.

faq.q: What happens if I redecorate?
faq.a: A re-capture is offered at 50% of the original price within twelve months.

faq.q: How do I share this with a guest who already booked?
faq.a: Paste the link into your pre-arrival message. It improves your reviews; guests feel oriented before they walk in the door.

faq.q: Can my cleaning team use it?
faq.a: Yes. Some hosts use the walkthrough as a reference for cleaners and stagers. It is a multi-use asset.

final_cta.h2: Capture this week. Live by the weekend.
final_cta.body: Book a pilot. We arrive at a time that suits you, capture in about 20 minutes per room, and send you the link the next morning. From $129. Yours forever.

clinics.demoted_reason: Forced fit per research — walkthrough is not the decision driver.
clinics.title: Spaces for medical clinics — Your patient picks the clinic she has walked through
clinics.description: 3D walkthroughs for medical tourism clinics. Reception, consultation, theatre, recovery. Privacy SOP standard. No patients in frame.
clinics.og_title: Walkthroughs that close medical tourism bookings
clinics.og_description: The patient who walks your theatre books your clinic, not Istanbul's. Privacy SOP. Multilingual deployment.
clinics.h1_line1: Your patient picks the clinic she has
clinics.subhead: Reception. Consultation. Theatre. Recovery. No patients in frame. Privacy SOP standard.
clinics.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi clinic captures shipping this quarter, captured under our privacy SOP.

outcomes.title: The trust gap, closed.
outcomes.body: Photos of equipment do not convey clinical competence. A walkthrough does. The patient deciding between you and an Istanbul clinic, after reading the same reviews, books the clinic she has walked through.

outcomes.title: Bookimed dependency, shrunk.
outcomes.body: Patients who arrive through your own website convert at higher margins. The walkthrough turns enquiries into bookings without an aggregator taking the cut. The fee saved on one procedure usually covers the engagement.

outcomes.title: Privacy by design.
outcomes.body: We capture without patients present. SOP documented and signed off before shoot day. GDPR-aligned. We sign a BAA on request. Your reputation is not at risk.

outcomes.title: Multilingual deployment.
outcomes.body: One walkthrough. Captions, hotspots, and CTAs deployed in Russian, Hebrew, Farsi, Arabic, English. One link per language, each pointed at your paid acquisition campaigns in that market.

objection.quote: Our reception is already on Instagram.
objection.reply: A photograph proves the room exists. A walkthrough proves the room is competent. The patient deciding between you and an Istanbul clinic is not deciding from Instagram. She is deciding from the depth of trust your website conveys. The walkthrough is the depth.

clinics.pricing_anchor: From $1,500 for a Standard engagement. Modules for additional treatment suites, recovery rooms, multilingual overlays. Hospital-scale captures at Major tier.

calculator.h2: See what your clinic capture costs, in a minute.
calculator.step3_label: How many treatment or surgery suites beyond reception?
calculator.step3_hint: Each suite captured as its own deliverable

faq.q: How do you handle patient privacy?
faq.a: We capture when the clinic is closed to patients or between cases on a planned non-patient day. A privacy SOP is agreed and signed before shoot day. No identifiable patient information is captured. We sign a BAA on request.

faq.q: Can we capture our operating theatre between cases?
faq.a: Yes. Theatre captures are scheduled around your case calendar. About 30 minutes per theatre with the lights up.

faq.q: Do you sign a Business Associate Agreement?
faq.a: Yes, on request, before capture day. Standard BAA template available, or we sign yours.

faq.q: Can we update the walkthrough when we expand?
faq.a: Yes. Re-captures of expanded floors at module pricing. New theatre or recovery suite captured in 48 hours.

faq.q: Can the walkthrough be paid-acquired against?
faq.a: Yes. Each multilingual variant is a distinct asset for paid campaigns in each market. We can co-build the landing pages if you do not have an in-house team.

final_cta.h2: One floor. One walkthrough. Zero patients in frame.
final_cta.body: Free pilot on one floor of the clinic. Link the next morning. Send it to your highest-value enquiry. If the result lands, we scope the rest. If it does not, you keep the pilot. No obligation.

restaurants.demoted_reason: Phase 2 hold — real fit but narrow pool, sector cash-strapped. Revisit after Phase 1 traction.
restaurants.title: Spaces for restaurants — Your interior is the marketing. Show it properly.
restaurants.description: 3D walkthroughs for design-led restaurants and bars. Private hire enquiries close on the first call. The dining room walks itself.
restaurants.og_title: Walkthroughs that close private hire enquiries
restaurants.og_description: The corporate planner walks your private floor from her desk. The bride walks your dining room from her phone. The call closes.
restaurants.subhead: Private hire enquiries close on the first call. The dining room walks itself.
restaurants.demo_caption: Sample tour from Spatial Studio. Real Tbilisi restaurant captures shipping this month.

outcomes.title: Private hire conversion.
outcomes.body: The corporate planner walks your private floor from her desk. The bride walks your dining room from her phone. The call closes faster. The 'can we come and see the space?' loop ends.

outcomes.title: The interior, finally working.
outcomes.body: You spent on the build. The interior is the differentiator. A walkthrough is the only medium that conveys it. Instagram captures moments. The walkthrough captures the space.

outcomes.title: The wasted-evening fix.
outcomes.body: No more in-person viewing appointments that block your reservation grid for a planner who is comparison-shopping. The walkthrough does that visit for you. On every device. Forever.

objection.quote: Our Instagram has every angle of the room.
objection.reply: Instagram sells the moment. The walkthrough sells the space. The corporate planner pitching her CEO needs to walk the room with her, on a screen. Instagram does not do that. The walkthrough does.

restaurants.pricing_anchor: From $500 for a Compact engagement. Modules for private floor, terrace, bar, dressing room. Multi-site groups at bespoke pricing.

calculator.h2: See what your venue capture costs, in a minute.

step2_options.name: Restaurant + private floor
step2_options.sub: Dining room plus private events floor

calculator.step3_label: Private floor, terrace, bar, dressing room?
calculator.step3_hint: Each captured as its own walkthrough

faq.q: Can you capture between services?
faq.a: Yes. We capture between lunch and dinner service, or on a closed day. About 20 minutes per defined space.

faq.q: Do you capture the kitchen?
faq.a: Optional. Some restaurants want the open kitchen captured to show craft. Others prefer the front-of-house only. Your call.

faq.q: Can we update for a refurb?
faq.a: Yes. Re-captures of changed scenes at module pricing.

faq.q: How does this work with our private-hire enquiry form?
faq.a: The walkthrough link drops into your auto-responder, into the enquiry confirmation, and into your sales deck. The planner walks before the call.

faq.q: Can the walkthrough live on our reservation platform?
faq.a: Most reservation platforms accept external links in the description field. We confirm fit on the scoping call.

final_cta.h2: Capture this week. Watch your private hire close rate move.
final_cta.body: Free pilot on one space — the dining room, the private floor, your call. Link the next morning. Send it to a planner mid-enquiry. Watch what happens. No obligation if it does not land.
